unique_vulnerabilities.name: Arbitrary ETH Transfer in solve()
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both findings reference the solve() function and the ETH transfer on lines 14-19. The 'arbitrary-send-eth' and 'external-function' checks are logically related to the same vulnerability.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Deprecated sha3() usage
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: This finding is specific to the use of a deprecated standard (sha3()) and does not overlap with other findings.

unique_vulnerabilities.name: Outdated Solidity Version
unique_vulnerabilities.reasoning: Both findings reference issues with the Solidity version used in the contract. They are logically related and describe the same underlying vulnerability.
